commands.review_summary:
The branch changes model-call diagnostics to count high-frequency streamed text, thinking, and tool-call delta bytes from `delta`, updates the OTEL/logging descriptions, and adjusts focused regression expectations.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests -11, Docs +2. Total +9 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main serializes each snapshotless stream event for byte accounting, while the PR head counts delta strings directly. I did not reproduce a live long-running local-model starvation session.
